selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 城镇, 市, 镇
words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 男人, 家伙
n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: n. 厨子, 厨师；vt. 烹调, 煮饭, 加热
words.definition: n. someone who cooks food

words.translation: adv. 宁可, 稍微, 相当
words.definition: r. on the contrary; rather (or instead), he wrote her a letter"

words.translation: n. 拜访, 访问, 游览, 视察；vt. 拜访, 访问, 参观, 视察, 降临
words.definition: n. the act of going to see some person or place or thing for a short time

words.translation: n. 噪音, 杂音, 响声, 喧闹；vt. 谣传
words.definition: n. sound of any kind (especially unintelligible or dissonant sound)

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 孔, 洞, 穴, 漏洞；vt. 挖洞, 掘坑
words.definition: n. an opening into or through something

words.translation: a. 较好的；adv. 比较好
n. 食物, 养料
words.definition: n. any substance that can be metabolized by an animal to give energy and build tissue

words.translation: n. 一半, 半场, 不完全；a. 一半的, 不完全的, 部分的, 半场的
words.definition: n. one of two divisions into which some games or performances are divided: the two divisions are separated by an interval

words.translation: n. 人, 人身, 人称
words.definition: n. a human being

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 旁边, 侧, 方面, 胁, 侧边, 血统；a. 旁的, 侧的, 次要的
words.definition: n. a place within a region identified relative to a center or reference location

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑
words.definition: v. be seated

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 木板, 甲板, 膳食, 会议桌；vt. 乘船, 供膳食, 用板覆盖
words.definition: n. a committee having supervisory powers

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 安静, 闲适, 平静；a. 安静的, 静止的, 寂静的, 朴素的, 从容的, 暗中的
n. 海, 海洋, 海浪, 大量
words.definition: n. a division of an ocean or a large body of salt water partially enclosed by land

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 差不多
adv. 平行地, 向前；prep. 沿着
words.definition: r. with a forward motion

words.translation: pron. 任何事
words.definition: n. Any object, act, state, event, or fact whatever; thing of

words.translation: n. 手臂, 袖子, 狭长港湾, 武器；vt. 武装, 装备
words.definition: n. a human limb; technically the part of the superior limb between the shoulder and the elbow but commonly used to refer to the whole superior limb

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: r. from a particular thing or place or position (`forth' is obsolete)

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: a. 清楚的, 明确的, 澄清的；adv. 清晰地
n. 课程, 路线, 过程, 一道菜, 道路；v. 追, (使)跑
words.definition: n. education imparted in a series of lessons or meetings

words.translation: n. 门
words.definition: n. a swinging or sliding barrier that will close the entrance to a room or building or vehicle

words.translation: a. 早的, 早熟的；adv. 很早, 初
words.definition: a. at or near the beginning of a period of time or course of events or before the usual or expected time

words.translation: n. 脚, 步调, 英尺, 底部, 末尾, 步兵；vt. 走在...上, 给...换底, 支付
words.definition: n. the part of the leg of a human being below the ankle joint

words.translation: n. 朋友, 支持者, 赞助者
words.definition: n. a person you know well and regard with affection and trust

words.translation: vi. 发生, 发生, 恰巧
words.definition: v. come to pass

words.translation: n. 中央, 中间, 腰部；a. 中央的, 中庸的, 中间的
words.definition: n. an intermediate part or section

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: adv. 一次, 曾经, 一旦；conj. 一旦, 一经
words.definition: r. on one occasion

words.translation: n. 公开, 户外, 空旷；a. 开着的, 开放的, 开阔的, 营业着的, 公开的, 悬而未决的
words.definition: n. a clear or unobstructed space or expanse of land or water

words.translation: adv. 也许, 大概
n. 回来, 返回, 来回票, 归还, 报答, 利润率, 报告书；a. 返回的, 回程的, 报答的, 反向的, 重现的, 复原的
words.definition: n. a coming to or returning home

words.translation: n. 季节, 时节, 当令期, 时期；vt. 给...调味, 使成熟, 使老练, 缓和
words.definition: n. a period of the year marked by special events or activities in some field

words.translation: a. 几个的, 一些的, 各自的；pron. 几个
words.definition: s. (used with count nouns) of an indefinite number more than 2 or 3 but not many

words.translation: vt. 花费, 浪费, 度过, 消耗, 消磨；vi. 花费, 用尽
words.definition: v. pass time in a specific way

words.translation: n. 故事, 小说, 传奇, 描述, 阅历, 经历, 层
words.definition: n. a piece of fiction that narrates a chain of related events

words.translation: n. 街道, 马路, 街区；a. 街道的
words.definition: n. a thoroughfare (usually including sidewalks) that is lined with buildings

words.translation: n. 太阳, 日, 日光, 阳光；vt. 晒
words.definition: n. the star that is the source of light and heat for the planets in the solar system

words.translation: n. 惊奇, 奇袭, 诧异；vt. 使惊奇, 撞见, 奇袭
words.definition: n. the astonishment you feel when something totally unexpected happens to you

words.translation: n. 等待, 等候；vt. 等候, 期待, 延缓, 伺候, 推迟
words.definition: n. the act of waiting (remaining inactive in one place while expecting something)

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. the quality or state of the achromatic color of greatest lightness (bearing the least resemblance to black)

words.translation: a. 年轻的, 无经验的, 朝气蓬勃的；n. 青年们, 幼小动物, 崽
n. 门, 牌楼, 大门, 通道, 闸；vt. 装门于
words.definition: n. a movable barrier in a fence or wall

words.translation: n. 草, 草原, 牧场
words.definition: n. narrow-leaved green herbage: grown as lawns; used as pasture for grazing animals; cut and dried as hay

words.translation: a. 活的, 生动的, 精力充沛的, 实况转播的；vi. 活, 生存, 居住
words.definition: a. actually being performed at the time of hearing or viewing

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 袋子, 袋状物；vt. 使膨大, 装袋, 猎获
words.definition: n. a flexible container with a single opening

words.translation: n. 椅子, 显要的席位, 主席；vt. 使入座, 使就任要职

words.translation: n. 死亡

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀

words.translation: n. 傍晚, 晚间, 末期
words.definition: n. the latter part of the day (the period of decreasing daylight from late afternoon until nightfall)

words.translation: a. 优良的, 杰出的, 出色的
words.definition: s. very good; of the highest quality

words.translation: vt. 除, 除外；vi. 反对

words.translation: n. 疾病, 坏事, 罪恶, 灾难；a. 生病的, 邪恶的, 不吉利的, 敌意的, 不良的, 不顺利的
n. 厨房, 全套炊具

words.translation: n. 错误, 误会；vi. 犯错, 误认

words.translation: adv. 几乎, 密切地

a. 私人的, 涉及隐私的, 有人性的, 人称的, 亲自的, 身体的
words.definition: a. concerning or affecting a particular person or his or her private life and personality

words.translation: n. 商店, 贮藏, 仓库, 备用品, 存储器；vt. 储存, 贮藏, 供给
words.definition: n. a supply of something available for future use

words.translation: n. 茶, 茶叶

words.translation: n. 星期二
words.definition: n. the third day of the week; the second working day

words.translation: conj. 除非；prep. 除...之外
words.definition: conj. Upon any less condition than (the fact or thing stated

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: pron. 无论什么
words.definition: s one or some or every or all without specification

words.translation: n. 报告, 解释, 估价, 理由, 利润, 算账, 帐目；vi. 报帐, 解释, 导致, 报偿, 占, 杀死

words.translation: n. 事件, 物质, 原因, 素材, 实体, 重要；vi. 有关系

words.translation: n. 取得, 拿, 诡计, 魂；vt. 接来, 取来, 售得, 带来, 推出, 引出, 杀死, 吸引, 到达
words.definition: n. the action of fetching

words.translation: a. 楼上的；adv. 在楼上, 向楼上, 处于更高地位

words.translation: a. 天生的；bear的过去分词

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的

words.translation: n. 秋天, 成熟期

words.translation: interj. 再会, 回头见

words.translation: n. 会话, 说话, 交谈

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁

words.translation: a. 空的, 空虚的, 空腹的, 空洞的；n. 空的东西, 空车

words.translation: a. 左边的, 左倾的, 左侧的, 左派的；adv. 在左面

words.translation: a. 大声的, 不断的, 喧吵的；adv. 高声地, 大声地

words.translation: n. 碟, 盘子, 盆中物, 金属板, 图版, 金银餐具, 印版, 金属牌(照)；vt. 镀金, 电镀, 用金属板固定, 给...装钢板, 为...制印版

words.translation: a. 薄的, 细的, 瘦的, 稀疏的, 稀薄的, 淡的, 弱的, 空洞的；vt. 使变薄, 使变细, 使稀少, 使淡

words.translation: n. 作家, 作家的著作, 创始人

words.translation: a. 饥饿的, 荒年的, 渴望的, 不毛的

words.translation: a. 忧虑的, 发愁的, 渴望的

words.translation: vi. 举止端正, 行为规矩；vt. 检点(自己的)行为, 使表现好

words.translation: vi. 属于, 合适
